title: isotoma senecioides
intro: Isotoma senecioides, also known as the blue star creeper, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Isotoma senecioides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
